results.title: Trump urges gasoline retailers to lower prices, warns of 'big problems' if they don't
results.description: U.S. President Donald ​Trump said on Monday gasoline retailers must get ‌prices down immediately and warned that there will be “big problems” ahead if they did not do so. Read more... The post Trump urges gasoline retailers to lower prices, warns of 'big problems' if they don't appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Synlait Milk Secures NZ$450 Million Refinancing for Turnaround Strategy
results.description: Synlait Milk has finalized a crucial NZ$450 million refinancing package, aligning with its Stabilise, Simplify, Scale strategy. The package integrates a new bank facility and a replacement shareholder loan from Bright Dairy.
